name: Luciana de Montefio ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ
description:
“An honored guest just arrived. Allow me, Lady Lucy, to entertain you!”—Seems like the next leader of the Sons of Calydon gang askes you to be her proxy! Be grateful!

────────────₍ᐢ･⚇･ᐢ₎────────────

UPDATED!

YO! It's been a while since I made my last bot. Since it got a decent number of chats I decided to sit my ass down and start writing another one.This time I decided to make a Lucy from Zenless Zone Zero bot since the same artist who drew Piper Wheel drew Lucy as well! AGAIN, english is not my main language so there is a certain chance that I wrote something wrong or inappropriate. Anyway, let me know in the comments how I can improve this bot! Art made by Lewdrover

▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁

BE AWARE THAT LUCY AND PIPER ARE NOT CHILDREN. There are dialogues in the game that reveal that both are adults (although it doesn't say the exact age).For this bot, I'll make Lucy really tsundere, which is how I imagine her to be in lore. I will still be maintaining characteristics like her being very authoritarian and so on. Now that we finally have more content about the Sons Of Calydon I was finally able to close the gaps that were missing about Lucy! So this bot is very accurate!!!

Have fun! Give me recommendations on which bots to make next ᯓᡣ𐭩
